snapshot_note: Overview V2 source snapshot with explicit upstream provenance, output classification, and per-metric freshness gates. REER and the static DFM fallback remain unavailable for current headline use until verified sources are supplied.

metrics.source_label: Statistics Agency SIAT annual GDP data, calculated YoY
caveats: SIAT 582 reports annual GDP growth rates as prior-year=100 index values; Overview stores index minus 100.
previous_value 6.7 is 2024 SIAT 582 index 106.7 minus 100.
SIAT 582 metadata note: for 2024 preliminary data.
metrics.source_reference: Calculated from SIAT sdmx_data_582 national aggregate Code 1700 annual GDP prior-year index for 2025: 107.7 minus 100. Previous value uses 2024 index 106.7 minus 100. Methodology: https://lib.stat.uz/ru/features-3/natsionalnye-scheta/622-yalpi-ichki-mahsulotni-ishlab-chiqarish-usulida-hisoblash-bo-yicha-uslubiy-nizom-3.

caveats: Preliminary quarterly national accounts release; owner verification is still required before public export.
previous_value 6.8 is the January-March 2025 real GDP growth rate shown in the same Statistics Agency Q1 GDP release.
Not an official GDP release; model nowcast only.
Owner-approved fallback value from the current static Overview estimate path; replace with accepted DFM Q2 artifact when available.
warnings: Static fallback nowcast is owner-approved for Overview V1 but is not an accepted DFM Q2 artifact.

caveats: Official composite CPI: 106.4 relative to June 2025.

metrics.source_label: Statistics Agency SIAT CPI data, calculated MoM
caveats: Monthly inflation can be volatile; do not present as trend alone.
previous_value 0.2 is May 2026 SIAT 4585 aggregate index 100.2 minus 100.
metrics.source_reference: Calculated from SIAT sdmx_data_4585 aggregate CPI previous-month index for June 2026: 100.6 minus 100. Previous value uses May 2026 aggregate index 100.2 minus 100.

caveats: Official CPI for the food-products main group: 106.3 relative to June 2025.

metrics.source_label: National Statistics Committee foreign trade release, calculated YoY
caveats: Official release reports USD 12,638.1 million in January-May 2026 versus USD 14,952.7 million in the recalculated January-May 2025 series.
metrics.source_reference: Calculated from the official June 30 foreign-trade release: 12,638.1 / 14,952.7 - 1 = -15.5% (rounded).

metrics.source_label: National Statistics Committee foreign trade release, calculated YoY
caveats: Official release reports USD 20,127.4 million in January-May 2026 versus USD 16,655.3 million in the recalculated January-May 2025 series.
metrics.source_reference: Calculated from the official June 30 foreign-trade release: 20,127.4 / 16,655.3 - 1 = 20.8% (rounded).

metrics.source_label: National Statistics Committee foreign trade release, calculated identity
metrics.source_reference: Accounting identity from the official release: USD 12,638.1 million exports minus USD 20,127.4 million imports = USD -7,489.3 million.
caveats: Displayed in USD billion; official release reports a USD 7,489.3 million foreign-trade deficit including goods and services.

metrics.source_label: Central Bank of Uzbekistan policy rate
caveats: Event-based policy setting; the Board kept the rate unchanged at 14 percent per annum.

metrics.source_label: Central Bank of Uzbekistan exchange rate
caveats: Official/reference rate, not transaction-weighted market average.
Latest observation: requested 2026-07-17; actual CBU date/rate 2026-07-17, 12093.35 UZS per USD.
Prior-month comparison observation: requested 2026-06-17; actual CBU date/rate 2026-06-17, 12012.12 UZS per USD.

metrics.source_reference: Calculated from CBU official USD rates: 12093.35 on 2026-07-17 and 12012.12 on 2026-06-17. Requested dates: latest 2026-07-17, prior-month 2026-06-17.
caveats: Latest observation: requested 2026-07-17; actual CBU date/rate 2026-07-17, 12093.35 UZS per USD.
Prior-month comparison observation: requested 2026-06-17; actual CBU date/rate 2026-06-17, 12012.12 UZS per USD.
Prior-year comparison observation: requested 2025-07-17; actual CBU date/rate 2025-07-17, 12758.36 UZS per USD.
Formula: ((latest - comparison) / comparison) * 100.
Rounded to 2 decimal places.
Positive means USD/UZS is higher, i.e. UZS depreciation against USD; negative means USD/UZS is lower, i.e. UZS appreciation against USD.

metrics.source_reference: Calculated from CBU official USD rates: 12093.35 on 2026-07-17 and 12758.36 on 2025-07-17. Requested dates: latest 2026-07-17, prior-year 2025-07-17.
caveats: Latest observation: requested 2026-07-17; actual CBU date/rate 2026-07-17, 12093.35 UZS per USD.
Prior-month comparison observation: requested 2026-06-17; actual CBU date/rate 2026-06-17, 12012.12 UZS per USD.
Prior-year comparison observation: requested 2025-07-17; actual CBU date/rate 2025-07-17, 12758.36 UZS per USD.
Formula: ((latest - comparison) / comparison) * 100.
Rounded to 2 decimal places.
Positive means USD/UZS is higher, i.e. UZS depreciation against USD; negative means USD/UZS is lower, i.e. UZS appreciation against USD.

metrics.source_reference: Owner-supplied CERR REER value; source URL to be provided and later automated through the HFI source path.
caveats: Index definition: 2019=100.
Methodology note: CPI-deflated real effective exchange rate, trade-weighted basket.
warnings: Source URL is pending; replace this owner-supplied CERR value with accepted HFI-backed source when available.

metrics.source_label: World Bank Pink Sheet gold price
caveats: External monthly average market price; not a CERR forecast.

metrics.source_label: World Bank Pink Sheet gold price, calculated
metrics.source_reference: Calculated from World Bank Pink Sheet monthly gold prices: 4228 for June 2026 and 4587 for May 2026
caveats: Comparison basis is MoM.

metrics.source_label: World Bank Commodity Markets Outlook gold forecast
caveats: External reference assumption, not a CERR forecast or policy recommendation.
Forecast vintage predates the March 2026 spot reading; do not read the level gap as a CERR call.
